summary: IFS public listing still has the known 20-route board covered locally; UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3 remains open and partner/evidence gated.
Eurostars Call 11 remains open to 10 September 2026 at 14:00 CEST/CET-equivalent project-platform deadline, but requires an innovative SME-led international consortium.
UKRI Japan-UK Advanced Connectivity full route is open with 6 October 2026 close, but requires an EPSRC-eligible UK research organisation and NICT-eligible Japanese collaborator.
InterTradeIreland Seedcorn Phase 2 upload closes 7 August 2026 at 13:00, but is available only to shortlisted companies.
Companies House active-company evidence is usable, but confirmation statement remains overdue and is a due-diligence blocker for new live applications.
